About Me

I automate the
repetitive, so humans
focus on the important.

Data Analyst turned Automation Engineer with 4+ years turning manual bottlenecks into intelligent, self-running systems. I build with n8n, Python, OpenAI, and a strong bias for measurable ROI.

From AI voice sales agents to LinkedIn outreach bots that book meetings on autopilot — I build systems that scale people.

n8n Python OpenAI GPT-4 Unipile API Power BI SQL / PostgreSQL Tableau Predictive Modeling A/B Testing ETL Pipelines Google Workspace REST APIs
